steps.title: Locate what historians suggest
steps.content: The passage states: “Some historians suggest that Maya mathematicians inherited it from the Olmec civilization, which flourished in the region 2,400–3,600 years ago.” This is the explicit claim about what historians suggest about Maya civilization.

steps.title: Match inheritance to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A uses “acquired” to express inheritance: the Maya received the zero symbol from the Olmec.

The other three options reference claims not made in the passage — respect hierarchies between historians and mathematicians (B), secrecy about achievements (C), or promotion of the writing system (D).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
